reasoning: Your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Last ride showed recovery trends, enabling focus on desired adaptations. Boost your aerobic base and lactate handling to excel at Alpine Loop's relentless climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Repeat 5 min at 209W, then 2 min at 249W. Complete 5 cycles, then add a 10-min push at 223W to finish.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
